title.en: Start OpenClaw from the homepage, not from a maze of docs.
title.zh: 别从文档迷宫开始，直接在首页完成 OpenClaw 入门。

summary.en: A bilingual OpenClaw learning hub for beginners who want the shortest path from setup to a real workflow.
summary.zh: 一个面向新手的 OpenClaw 双语学习站，目标是把你从环境配置直接带到第一个真实工作流。

sideTitle.en: What you should accomplish in your first 30 minutes
sideTitle.zh: 前 30 分钟应该完成什么

sideItems.en: Understand what OpenClaw is actually good at.
sideItems.zh: 先搞清楚 OpenClaw 真正擅长什么。

sideItems.en: Install the minimal viable setup and verify it works.
sideItems.zh: 完成最小可用安装，并验证它真的能跑。

sideItems.en: Connect one chat channel and send one successful test loop.
sideItems.zh: 接通一个聊天渠道，并跑通一次测试消息闭环。

sideItems.en: Run one starter workflow that produces useful output.
sideItems.zh: 跑通一个能产出结果的入门工作流。

summary.en: This is the shortest beginner path we can recommend without pretending OpenClaw is simpler than it is.
summary.zh: 这是目前最短、同时不过度简化 OpenClaw 复杂度的新手路径。

title.en: Learn is the deeper OpenClaw resource hub.
title.zh: Learn 是更深入的 OpenClaw 资源中心。

summary.en: Use Learn as your tutorial shelf for foundations, setup strategy, workflow design, Chinese ecosystem patterns, recovery paths, and day-to-day operating tips.
summary.zh: 把 Learn 当成你的教程书架：这里集中放基础认知、环境搭建、工作流设计、中文生态、排错恢复和日常使用技巧。

title.en: Templates organized by the work you want done.
title.zh: 按工作目标组织的起步模板库。

summary.en: Use Templates as a directory of practical starting points: briefings, content production, collaboration, research, monitoring, and Chinese ecosystem workflows.
summary.zh: 把 Templates 当成一个可落地的起点目录：从信息简报、内容生产、团队协作、调研分析、监控告警到中文生态工作流，都按工作目标组织起来。

title.en: Diagnose OpenClaw by symptom, not by random guesses.
title.zh: 按症状诊断 OpenClaw，而不是靠随机猜测。

summary.en: Use Troubleshoot as a diagnostic hub: start from what failed, narrow the likely causes, and only then change setup, models, or workflows.
summary.zh: 把 Troubleshoot 当成诊断中心来用：先从失败现象出发，缩小可能原因，再决定是否改 setup、模型或工作流。
